title: Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design - Message from the Head of the Department
content:
Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design - Message from the Head of the Department

Dear friends

As an interior architect and designer candidate, I congratulate you all for choosing one of the most beautiful professions. Interior architecture and environmental design are parts of a unique creation process where aesthetics and function are combined in the creation of qualified spaces and their environments together with the profession of architecture; art and positive science come together.

In our department, you will learn the most up-to-date details of practicing this ancient profession, and you will shape our future with the knowledge and self-confidence you will have depending on the education you will receive.

I wish you endless success in your studies.

This content was updated on 08/09/2024.
